title: Understanding BOC Assessment Workflows
summary: A comprehensive breakdown of the Bureau of Customs formal entry processing, from electronic manifest submission to final gate clearance.

title: HS Code Breakdown: Electronics & Machinery
summary: Guidelines for classifying imported computing hardware and industrial components under Chapter 84 and 85 to prevent misdeclaration penalties.

title: FDA Certificate of Product Registration (CPR)
summary: Step-by-step compliance rules for securing mandatory Food and Drug Administration clearances prior to the arrival of regulated commodities.

title: Broker Representation Requirements
summary: Mandatory authorization documents required to designate Broker Ferddy Mark Sardan as your official declarant before the Bureau of Customs.

title: Managing Urgent Container Hold Protocols
summary: What to do when your container is flagged for an X-ray or physical examination alert, and how to route documentation instantly to reduce demurrage.
